Donal's Leggings of Mourning  
 

Lore Item
Slot: LEGS
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 26
STR: +8 STA: +8 WIS: +8 HP: +30 MANA: +30
Effect: Symbol of Naltron (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 45
Recast Delay: 55 seconds, Recast Type: 2
WT: 7.5 Size: LARGE
Class: CLR
Race: ALL except IKS VAH
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Lore Item

Charges: Unlimited

Rarity: Rare

Just soloed him last night
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2007 at 10:00 AM Rating: Decent
ExedorDruid
Scholar
24 posts
Just soloed him last night and he dropped these and a nightshade scented staff. I was hoping for some ranger or rogue legs for my alts but oh well.

Bought a pair for 7K on FV. It still requires a peridot when cast.

# Jul 27 2005 at 12:46 PM Rating: Good

Scholar
115 posts
Definately no longer requires peridots ever since the patch awhile back that removed so many material component requirements. My wife clicks hers all the time and she doesn't even carry peridots anymore.

no dots?
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2003 at 7:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254254545
View User Forum
56 posts
Pedir,
Did you find out what the deal is with your pair? I just traded a good 25k worth of gear for these legs and it still uses pdots- too bad. Think i'm just going to sell them now.

Quai Zeemoto of Sullon Zek
▲ Page top
RE: no dots?
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2003 at 1:55 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592756713303
26 posts
maybe the person not seeing periodot use has a high level reagent conservation focus item and has had some lucky checks to see if the focus worked look for any message about another item glowing when you use the legs.
▲ Page top
peridot no longer needed?
QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2002 at 8:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175393914
6 posts
I just a pair of these today:)) I have not had much time to play with them, but I cast this on 7 toons in the bazaar and did NOT see my peridot stash (I keep six stacks on me at all times) go down at all...I *thought* while mana-less, these would still require one peridot per cast...a patch change perhaps? Or a bug? /em shrugs ... I hope a patch change myself as I can also use them for mana-less healing during down-time:)

Any thoughts?
▲ Page top
RE: peridot no longer needed?
QuoteReply
# Mar 31 2003 at 3:35 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Most likely, like most clerics, you had a second stack (or partial stack) of peridots in another bag. These legs have always eaten one per cast for me.
▲ Page top
Bazaar
QuoteReply
# Oct 13 2002 at 1:26 PM Rating: Good

These dropped off VS tonight on Karana server. Took us 2 tries but we nailed him 2nd time.
▲ Page top
useful? yes, worth the efford? no
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2002 at 1:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755245886
103 posts
VS is no joke... its much more easy to get kael leggins in arena or something.

but these legs are nice, the effect is good for raid buffing 2nd tanks and casters, its manaless. very nice.

our main cleric got these today...

of course these legs dropped, and a druid staff

question
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2001 at 2:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248758846
View User Forum
161 posts
This may be a stupid question but...Do you need a gem in inventory to use trigger like you do for the spell? If not this will save us Clerics alot of money in having to buy gems for our symbol spells..well good hunting and safe journey to all.
▲ Page top
RE: question
QuoteReply
# Jan 02 2002 at 1:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1669594705423
174 posts
Not a stupid question, but one that has already been answered in this thread. Yes, it still uses a peridot.
▲ Page top
~Cough~
QuoteReply
# Oct 27 2001 at 7:18 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591769524583
4 posts
I picked a pair of these leggings up the other night on a VS raid. I uhm... had a heart attack... then I screamed at the top of my lungs, and fell over in my chair when I realized I had won the roll. These leggings are awesome, and such a nice prize for a VS raid well done. Thank you Vita Infinita, and Inevitable Storm!!!!

Keraa Mell
51st Vicar of Lanys T`vyl

P.S. Venril Sathir is a beast and then some, I'm suprised and thankful that my fellow clerics and I kept our main assist alive :)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 10 2001 at 5:21 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Bah if I got these and someone offered 100k I would take it in a second, and then just pay someone to MQ the greaves of forbiddon rites(Dwarf quest effect group heal thingy)
#Anonymous, Posted: May 30 2001 at 6:19 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Is this a typo? The effect is random, not triggered? That lowers the desirablity of this IMO. I would like to be able to cast symbol when needed, especially if it uses a peridot each cast.
RE: Random, not Triggered

I heard that somone was offered 100k for a pair on my server and turned them down. Well, these are just about the best cleric leggings that a cleric may obtain. If I was so lucky to get these, I doubt I would sell them either. Well, maybe, but It would have to be damn well worth it!!

QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2001 at 10:43 AM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
And so am I. Some folk realize that the items fit into certain archetypes for the races, this being "all races capable of wearign plate". Think before you call people dumb, make sure you aren't fitting into your own description.

When you use the effect, it requires the spell component. All your saving is mana.

▲ Page top
RE: yet another nice effect =)
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 7:01 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
i wouldn't call this effect nice, sure the stas are nice but the symbol effect using the peridot is cheap, i'd rather spend the mana on the 54 symbol and get more hp/duration out of the peridot i'm using
▲ Page top
not shabby for verant
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2001 at 5:45 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The whole suit goes pretty well i think. Helm is yaulp 2, not bad, not great, but still, the AC is what matters on that helm, the rest of the suit makes up for its lack of +wis or anyother stat you would be upset, considering the helm gives no stat. The arms have a great ac, and proc valor, along with the legs, who give a great symbol, and the gloves, which proc armor of faith (hoping that isnt the self only armor spell). with those 3 alone you could buff someone up very well.
Boots are AOE effect tremor, 120 aoe, not bad at all, 6 second casting time, but more for fun that really fighting. if a mob is low on health and so is the group, wacking a couple of them with this wouldnt harm, its for certain instances....BP which is obviously obscenely rare, procs that complete heal which verant is going to nerf, as a cleric i hate the nerf, but then again, any other class deserves it, its just too unfair combined with a tank ( i think it was if the mob cant kill the warrior in 12 seconds, then the tank is unkillable) so all in all i think the set is VERY amazing. i need the gloves, helm, legs, and bp, goodluck on me getting any of them...hah
▲ Page top
